tragicHero.name: World Cup Daily
tragicHero.story:
Scotland on the brink after Brazil beating, Mexico march on | World Cup Daily

Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning, Mark Langdon, Nicky Bandini and Ewan Murray as Scotland are beaten convincingly by Brazil to leave their chances of progress.
